'''Vertag''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Zeltron/Legends|Zeltron]] [[Governor/Legends|governor]] from the [[Northern Province]] of [[Zeltros/Legends|Zeltros]]. He had five daughters, that the Zeltron aides—[[Marruc]], [[Rahuhl]], [[Bahb]] and [[Jahn]]—were involved with before they fled the planet. Vertag attended the party thrown to celebrate the arrival of the heroes from the [[Alliance of Free Planets]], which caused the aides to flee the party.
